    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Struct NodeCurveSamplers

    Represents an proxy to acccess the animation curves of a Node. Use GetCurveSamplers(Animation) for access.

    Inherited Members
    ValueType.ToString()
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public readonly struct NodeCurveSamplers : IEquatable<NodeCurveSamplers>

    Fields

    Name Description
    Animation
    TargetNode

    Properties

    Name Description
    HasMorphingCurves

    True if there's a morphing curve.
    HasTransformCurves

    True if any of Scale, Rotation or Translation is defined.
    Morphing

    Gets the raw Morphing sampler, or null if there's no curve defined.
    MorphingSparse

    Gets the SparseWeight8 Morphing sampler, or null if there's no curve defined.
    Rotation

    Gets the Rotation sampler, or null if there's no curve defined.
    Scale

    Gets the Scale sampler, or null if there's no curve defined.
    Translation

    Gets the Translation sampler, or null if there's no curve defined.

    Equals(NodeCurveSamplers)

    GetMorphingSampler<TWeights>()

    Gets the morphing sampler, or null if there's no curve defined.
